name: a cloud named in a business answer forces its namespace into the in-scope set
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --answer "hosting=runs on Microsoft Azure with AKS" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["namespaces"].include?("azure") ? 0:1)' && echo azure-from-answer-in-scope 1>&2
